changelog.en:
After canceling the OTA during the curtain's operation and restarting the device, the issue of being unable to initiate another OTA was resolved.
During the curtain's movement, commands like reverse on/off are not accepted. Only a stop command can be given to solve the situation where two contradictory commands, "on" and "100%", are sent simultaneously by ECHOV4.
After setting the bind attribute to 1, change it to 0.
During the initialization startup, if it is 0%, set the value to "on"; if it is 100%, set the value to "off".

wakeInstruction.en: By controlling them in the Homey App, if it can be successfully controlled, it means the sleep mode has been activated.
